criteria_with_verdicts.criterion: User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.
Form validation rejects empty required fields with an inline error message.
Logout button signs the user out and redirects to /login.

aggregation_rule_applied: Per /flow:verify-build Step 7 + FB-0011 autonomy bar: any criterion with Unknown verdict on any dimension aggregates to Unknown overall. Any FAIL aggregates to FAIL. All-PASS aggregates to PASS. Exit code: PASS=0, FAIL=1, Unknown=1.
expected_routing: Step 8 writes the per-criterion + per-dimension verdicts with evidence + notes to the findings buffer. /flow:ship Step 4a reads + merges into feedback.md FB-XXXX format with the Unknown criteria as primary candidates for capture.
